channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Zimbabwean families driven from their homes camp outside Limpopo police station
item.description: GroundUp LIMPOPO – Chivhayo Sinorema says he has lived in Khuvhi village, Thohoyandou, since 2009, surviving on odd jobs in construction sector, cutting wood or gardening, and sending money to support his wife and two children in Zimbabwe. Then a week ago, a mob accompanied by his landlord, told him he must leave. We spoke [...] The post Zimbabwean families driven from their homes camp outside Limpopo police station appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: ZCTU suspends Secretary General Marimo amid chaotic executive meeting
item.description: The Zimbabwe Congress of Trade Unions (ZCTU) has suspended its Secretary General, Tirivanhu Marimo, following a chaotic National Executive Committee meeting on Thursday that descended into heated exchanges amid an escalating leadership dispute. Sources familiar with the proceedings told NewZimbabwe.com that the National Executive Committee (NEC) tabled a motion to suspend Marimo on allegations of [...] The post ZCTU suspends Secretary General Marimo amid chaotic executive meeting appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: IMF, Zimbabwe reach staff-level agreement on first review of monitoring program
item.description: CGTN The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has announced that it reached a staff-level agreement with Zimbabwe on the first review of its 10-month Staff-Monitored Program, marking a further step in the country’s efforts to restore macroeconomic stability, clear external arrears and re-engage with international creditors. The IMF said implementation of the programme through the end [...] The post IMF, Zimbabwe reach staff-level agreement on first review of monitoring program appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: AmaZulu release Zimbabwean midfielder Mason Mushore after six months
item.description: South African Premiership side AmaZulu FC have parted ways with Zimbabwean midfielder Mason Mushore, bringing an end to his six-month spell at the club. The 23-year-old joined Usuthu from Highlanders FC in January but struggled to establish himself, failing to make a single Betway Premiership appearance before being released ahead of the 2026/27 season. AmaZulu [...] The post AmaZulu release Zimbabwean midfielder Mason Mushore after six months appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Harare’s Matchday Economy Gets a Boost as Zimbabwe Hosts India @zimsituation
item.description: When India come to Zimbabwe, Harare starts to feel it before the first ball is bowled. Bars check their screens, food sellers prepare a little more than usual, and fans begin arguing about team selection in WhatsApp groups long before the match starts. A tour like this doesn’t just sit on the sports calendar. For [...] The post Harare’s Matchday Economy Gets a Boost as Zimbabwe Hosts India appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zimbabwean Police working ‘flat out’ to locate, apprehend UK triple murder suspect
item.description: BULAWAYO – Zimbabwean police are “working flat out” to establish whether a man suspected of killing his wife and two young daughters in England is in the country, a spokesman said on Thursday. Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, 45, was captured on Heathrow Airport cameras leaving the United Kingdom on July 4, travelling on a British passport. [...] The post Zimbabwean Police working ‘flat out’ to locate, apprehend UK triple murder suspect appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Nigeria Advances Ambition to Become Africa’s Next Lithium Powerhouse with Australian-Backed Mining Portfolio
item.description: Nigeria is making significant progress in its bid to establish itself as one of Africa’s leading suppliers of critical minerals after regulators approved the transfer of additional lithium exploration licences to Australian-listed Chariot Corporation. The approvals mark another milestone in the company’s acquisition of an 11-mineral-title portfolio, highlighting growing international investor confidence in Nigeria’s rapidly [...] The post Nigeria Advances Ambition to Become Africa’s Next Lithium Powerhouse with Australian-Backed Mining Portfolio appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: She Wanted A Divorce: What Zandile Tshuma Told Friends Before She And Her Daughters Were Killed In The UK
item.description: She Wanted A New Life: Fresh Details Emerge After Zandile Tshuma And Daughters Killed Fresh details have emerged after a Zimbabwean woman and her two young daughters were found dead in their Bedford home, with friends saying she had wanted to divorce her husband. Ndodana Tshuma, 45, also known as Mark, is wanted by British [...] The post She Wanted A Divorce: What Zandile Tshuma Told Friends Before She And Her Daughters Were Killed In The UK appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Tsholotsho man sentenced to community service for bestiality @bulawayo24
item.description: A 36-year-old man from Tsholotsho in Matabeleland North has been sentenced after admitting to a charge of bestiality involving a female goat.Leonard Moyo of Dugwi Line, Chefunye, appeared before the T... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

Ben Curran makes history for Zimbabwe

item.title: Total Eclipse of the Heart singer Bonnie Tyler dies aged 75
item.description: Singer Bonnie Tyler, known for hits including Total Eclipse of the Heart, Holding Out for a Hero and It’s a Heartache, has died at the age of 75. A message posted on the official website, external for the hugely popular Welsh power ballad diva read: “Bonnie’s family and team are heartbroken to announce that Bonnie [...] The post Total Eclipse of the Heart singer Bonnie Tyler dies aged 75 appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Air Zimbabwe resumes direct Harare-London flights from July 22
item.description: Airline announces promotional fares as it returns to the route since 2011 The post Air Zimbabwe resumes direct Harare-London flights from July 22 appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Air Zimbabwe Announces London Return Date, Sets Promotional Prices @263Chat
item.description: The London route was once among Air Zimbabwe’s flagship international services, linking Zimbabwe directly with the United Kingdom, home to one of the country’s largest diaspora communities and an important source market for tourism, business travel and investment. The post Air Zimbabwe Announces London Return Date, Sets Promotional Prices appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat
